purpose: Canonical output contract for first-class semantic artifact verdict execution
rules: verdict output must be deterministic for the same artifact input and declared evidence
reason_codes must be machine-stable and order-stable
observations must contain only execution-derived facts
NOT_EXECUTABLE must be used when the claimed subject or indispensable execution prerequisite is absent
FAILED must be used only when semantic execution did occur and claim conditions were not satisfied
adapter acceptance alone must not be promoted into a semantic verdict

notes: semantic readiness conditions were evaluated from declared evidence
